prose:
**Aniline HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitting via RI-JK) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: taken from the supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz` and used as-is (single-point). SCF converged in 9 cycles; no warnings reported.

HOMO = −5.553772 eV  
LUMO = −0.2489544 eV  
→ gap = 5.3048177 eV

Command:  
`cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard aniline.xyz`

Live log is being written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpqhds__0i/frontier_YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.out` (SCF progress & output).
